# Five Below — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Five Below is a popular value-focused retail chain known for offering a wide variety of fun, trendy, and affordable products — primarily toys, games, and lifestyle items priced at $5, $10, and $25. A new location is coming soon to Glenwood Plaza in Oneida, New York, bringing the brand's signature high-energy, budget-friendly shopping experience to the local community.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://five-below-03e613e1.zappy5.app
Discover the hottest toys, games, and lifestyle gear priced at just $5, $10, and $25! Find a Five Below near you or shop the newest budget-friendly trends now.

Thank you for contacting our driveline retail merchandising team. Your message has been successfully received.

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://five-below-03e613e1.zappy5.app
- Endpoint: https://five-below-03e613e1.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text)
  - `email` (email)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (text)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Five Below
Five Below is a popular value-focused retail chain known for offering a wide variety of fun, trendy, and affordable products — primarily toys, games, and lifestyle items priced at $5, $10, and $25. A new location is coming soon to Glenwood Plaza in Oneida, New York, bringing the brand's signature high-energy, budget-friendly shopping experience to the local community.

## Target Audience
- shoppers looking for affordable products, families, teens, and budget-conscious consumers
- Budget-Conscious Families
- Teen Trendsetters
- College Students on a Budget

## Industry
Retail

---

- Robots: https://five-below-03e613e1.zappy5.app/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://five-below-03e613e1.zappy5.app/llms-full.txt
